generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years in civil defense planning, I can tell you: our communities need better emergency preparedness. The threats we face today - from extreme weather to potential conflicts - require us to be ready. Supporting local preparedness programs isn't just about security, it's about responsible citizenship. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes. #CommunityResilience #NationalSecurity
